change.item: Added date and time display support for article publication dates
Improved publication timestamp visibility for news and editorial websites

note.item: Recommended update for all DevArt News installations
No database, frontend template, cache, query or module behavior changes in this release

fix.item: Fixed article selector visibility in widget Data settings
Fixed Selected Articles picker incorrectly appearing for non selected article source modes
Fixed administrator widget configuration workflow inconsistency in source-specific field visibility

change.item: Improved administrator widget Data tab source-dependent field behavior
Improved configuration workflow consistency for widget article source selection

note.item: Recommended update for all DevArt News v1.0.0 installations
No frontend rendering, cache, template or module behavior changes in this release

addition.item: Added full Joomla 6 native DevArt News component with modern MVC architecture
Added DevArt News frontend module integration
Added widget manager with create and edit workflows
Added widget import and export functionality
Added article source modes for latest articles, category filtered articles, selected articles and related articles
Added selected article picker with search and pagination
Added ordering controls and article limit settings
Added first image inside article content support
Added GitHub-based Joomla native update support

change.item: Architecture designed specifically for Joomla 6 and PHP 8.2+
Frontend rendering optimized for lightweight production-safe output
Article rendering designed for Joomla Page Cache compatibility
Frontend output optimized for Cloudflare and CDN-friendly deployments
Compact List template optimized for sidebar, related and mobile compact use cases
CSS and JavaScript namespaced to minimize template conflicts
Widget rendering optimized for high-traffic editorial environments
Preview and widget management workflows refined during release candidate hardening

security.item: Added SQL injection protection using Joomla database APIs and parameterized queries
Added XSS protection through proper output escaping
Added CSRF protection for administrator actions
Added ACL enforcement for administrator operations
Added safe image handling and controlled cache generation workflows

note.item: Initial public release of DevArt News for Joomla 6
Designed for editorial, magazine, news and high-traffic Joomla websites
Always test on staging before production deployment
